quotes.text: A/B testing is how you find out which of your two bad ideas is slightly less bad.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Don't find customers for your product. Find products for your customers.
quotes.author: Peter Drucker

quotes.text: The aim of marketing is to know and understand the customer so well the product or service fits them and sells itself.
quotes.author: Peter Drucker

quotes.text: The best marketing strategy is having a product people actually want to tell their friends about.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your tech stack matters less than your distribution. A mediocre product with great distribution beats a great product with no distribution.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best marketing is a product that sells itself. The second best is a customer who sells it for you.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your product should be good enough to sell itself. If it isn't, fix the product, not the marketing.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best marketing strategy is to make your product so good that people can't shut up about it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your product is your resume. Build something people want to talk about.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best businesses are the ones where the customer doesn't know they're paying for marketing. The marketing IS the product.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your churn rate tells you more about your product than your acquisition rate ever will.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your best sales channel is word of mouth. Build a product people can't shut up about.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to handle objections is to not have them in the first place. Build a product so good it sells itself.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best marketing strategy is to make something worth talking about.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your product is your best marketing tool. If it's good, people will talk about it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best growth strategy is to make your product so good that marketing is optional.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best customer success strategy is to build a product so good that customers never need help.
quotes.author: based
